name: Grade Transfer Test (JS)
description: Test-only flow for the scale matching and grade transfer backend, with no OneDrive or AI integration. A webhook receives { country, grades } directly (as the AI step would have produced), resolves the matching scale via POST /scales/match (ranked by grade coverage), then runs the transfer for the covered grades and returns the result. If no scale can be confidently resolved, a needs-review JSON is returned instead. Backend calls are done with a CODE step (JS variant).
author: D E
